items.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human

items.title: Quoting Dean W. Ball
items.summary: This is a bad state of affairs. Consider, in particular, some industry dynamics: Frontier models are trained at an enormous cost, and a significant fraction of that cost is recouped in the few post-release months that they are broadly available. After that period elapses, the models become sub-frontier, competition emerges, and margins compress. Every week o
